sourcesContent:
import { useEffect, useRef } from "react" import ScrollReveal from "scrollreveal" export default function Footer () { const revealRef = useRef(null); useEffect( () => { ScrollReveal().reveal( revealRef.current, { origin: 'bottom', distance: '70px', duration: 500, // durasi animasi dalam ms delay: 200, // delay sebelum animasi dimulai easing: 'ease-in-out', // tipe easing }) }) return (
) }
